entries.source: Data Interpreter
entries.value: Data-interpretasie

entries.source: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik vir leer in plaas van passiewe antwoordversameling. Die modus draai om 'n spesifieke taak: plak data, grafiekbeschrijvingen of resultaten en leer wat hulle betekenen, wat hulle nie betekenen en wat jy daarna moet vrae.

entries.source: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode: praktiese gids

entries.source: Data Interpreter prompts and study loop
entries.value: Data Interpreter-prompts en studielus

entries.source: Dates and summaries matter, but learners often need a way into the human situation: what people believed, what choices they saw, what limits shaped them, and what they could not have known.
entries.value: Datums en opsommings is belangrik, maar leerders wat dikwels 'n ingang nodig tot die menslike situatie: wat mense geglo het, watter keuses hulle gesien het, watter beperkings hulle gevorm het en wat hulle nie kon weten.

entries.source: Debate helps you separate claims, evidence, values, and assumptions, which makes historical interpretation more precise.
entries.value: Debat help jou om stellings, bewyse, waardes en aannames te skei, wat historiese interpretasie meer presies maak.

entries.value: Debatteer geregtigheid met Batman

entries.source: Debate modes that help learners make claims, face counterarguments, and improve reasoning under pressure.
entries.value: Debatmodi wat leerders help claims te formuleer, teenargumente aan te gaan en redeneer onder druk te verbeter.

entries.value: Debatteer die stelling

entries.source: Debate the claim from more than one side so you can notice assumptions, tradeoffs, and weak evidence.
entries.value: Debatteer die stelling van meer as een kant sodat jy aannames, afwegings en swak bewyse kan raaksien.

entries.source: Debate this historical or philosophical claim from both sides. Separate evidence, assumptions, and values.
entries.value: Debatteer hierdie historiese of filosofiese stelling van albei kante. Skei bewyse, aannames en waardes.

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI
entries.value: Debatteer met 'n persoonlikheid met AI

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Debate With A Personality Using AI is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik vir leer in plaas van passiewe antwoordversameling. Die modus draai om 'n spesifieke taak: noem 'n regte of fictieve persoonlikheid en debatteer met diegene oor elke onderwerp. Die AI toegang verkry tot hulle openbare styl en wereldbeeld terwyl wat debat eerlik bly.

entries.value: Debate With A Personality Using AI: praktiese gids

entries.source: Did the AI check your reasoning instead of simply replacing it?
entries.value: Controleerde die AI jy redenasie in plaas van wat simpelweg te vdaarvang?

entries.source: Did you answer at least one question before reading the correction?
entries.value: Het jy minstens een vraag beantwoord voordat jy die correctie las?

entries.source: Different jobs need different modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and more.
entries.value: Verschillende take wat verskillende modusse nodig: Sokratiese vrae, huiswerkwenke, flitskaarte, debat, historiese rolspellen, schrijfkritiek en meer.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: Verschillende leertake wat verskillende flows nodig. Gebruik 'n huiswerkafrigter vir wenke, 'n wiskundestappeafrigter vir probleemoplossing, 'n Sokratiese tutor vir diep begrip, flitskaarte vir herinnering en vasvrae vir oefening onder druk.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Verschillende leertake wat verskillende interaksievormen nodig, daarom gebruik inspir aktief, modusspesifiek onderrig. 'n huiswerkwenk, Sokratiese vraag, historiese simulatie, flitskaartherhaling en schrijfkritiek horen homself nie te gedragen as dieselfde generieke chat.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.
entries.value: Verschillende leertake wat verskillende vormen nodig: Sokratiese vrae, huiswerkwenke, flitskaarte, debat, historiese rolspellen, schrijfkritiek en studiebebeplanning.

entries.source: Different people need different AI learning routes.
entries.value: Verschillende mense wat verskillende AI-leerpaaie nodig.

entries.source: Disallowed
entries.value: Nie toegestaan

entries.source: Disclaimer Of Warranty
entries.value: Afwijzing van gaanrantie

entries.source: Disclosure of Data
entries.value: Openbaarmaking van data

entries.source: Discover paths that fit you
entries.value: Ontdek paaie wat by jou pas

entries.source: Discover paths that fit you.
entries.value: Ontdek paden wat by jy passen.

entries.source: Discovery
entries.value: Ontdekking

entries.source: Discovery is open where the content is public.
entries.value: Ontdekking staat oopmaak waar die inhoud openbaar is.

entries.source: Dismiss language options
entries.value: Sluit taalopsies

entries.source: Distribution that started offline
entries.value: Verspreiding wat offline begon

entries.source: Diverge, cluster, choose, refine, and make the idea actionable.
entries.value: Divergeer, cluster, kies, verfyn en maak die idee uitvoerbaar.

entries.source: DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims
entries.value: DMCA-kennisgeving en procedure vir claims oor kopieregskending

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: Weet ik wat ik hierna moet oefen?

entries.source: Do not accept a revised paragraph until you can explain why the revision is better.
entries.value: Moenie 'n hersiene paragraaf aanvaar totdat jy kan verduidelik waarom die hersiening beter is nie.

entries.source: Do not act like a passive Q&A tutor or bury work in chat. Do not overpraise weak output. Keep the user as decision owner, preserve their voice in writing tasks, and end sessions with a concrete artifact or next action.
entries.value: Tree nie as 'n passiewe vraag-en-antwoordtutor en begraaf werk nie in chat. Prys swak werk nie oordrewe. Hou die gebruiker eienaar van die besluit, behoud hulle stem in skryftake en eindig sessies met 'n concreet artefact of 'n volgende aksie.

entries.source: Do not advance just because the learner clicked next. Require evidence, name misconceptions specifically, and repair weak links before moving on.
entries.value: Ga nie verder net omdat die leerder op volgende geklik het. Eis bewyse, benoem wanopvattings spesifiek en herstel swak skakels voordat jy voortgaan.

entries.source: Do not amplify hateful or dangerous arguments. Reframe sensitive topics around evidence, ethics, and learning.
entries.value: Versterk geen haatdragende of gevaarlijke argumente. Herkader gevoelige onderwerpe rondom bewyse, etiek en leer.

entries.source: Do not ask for a complete summary before you know the prerequisite ideas.
entries.value: Moenie vir 'n volledige opsomming vra voordat jy die vereiste voorafidees ken nie.

entries.source: Do not ask learners to run unsafe code. Explain security-sensitive code at a high level when needed.
entries.value: Vra leerders nie om onveilige kode uit te voeren. Verduidelik beveiligingsgevoelige kode waar nodig op hoofdlijnen uit.

entries.source: Do not ask which product wins. Ask which learning behavior fits.
entries.value: Vra nie watter produk wint. Vra watter leergedrag past.

entries.source: Do not claim live verification without tools. Recommend checking primary sources for current facts.
entries.value: Claim geen lewendig verificatie sonder hulpmiddels. Raad aan om primaire bronne te kontroleer vir actuele feiten.

entries.source: Do not complete graded work for the learner. Make them own the final response.
entries.value: Maak beoordeeld werk nie af vir die leerder. Laat hulle eienaar bly van wat eindantwoord.

entries.source: Do not confuse a fast answer with mastery.
entries.value: Verwar 'n vinnig antwoord nie met beheersing.

entries.source: Do not debate only the side you already agree with.
entries.value: Moenie net die kant debatteer waarmee jy reeds saamstem nie.

entries.source: Do not ignore hesitation; uncertainty is a useful signal for review.
entries.value: Moenie huiwering ignoreer nie; onsekerheid is 'n nuttige sein vir hersiening.

entries.source: Do not invent bibliographic details. Mark unknown fields clearly.
entries.value: Verzin geen bibliografische details. Markeer onbekende velden duidelik.

entries.source: Do not invent citations. Clearly mark when source verification is needed.
entries.value: Verzin geen citaties. Markeer duidelik wanneer bronverificatie nodig is.

entries.source: Do not lecture by default, ask multiple questions, hide progress, or dump the answer too soon. Use hint ladders before explanations. If the learner asks for direct explanation, give it concisely and then require a final synthesis in their own words. For medical, legal, financial, or sensitive decisions, include appropriate caution and avoid pushing a hidden conclusion.
entries.value: Gee nie standaard college, stel nie meerdere vrae, verberg voortgaanng nie en dump die antwoord nie te vinnig. Gebruik wenkladders vóór verduideliking. As die leerder om directe verduideliking vra, gee wat beknopt en eis daarna 'n eindsynthese in eie woorde. Voeg by medische, regs, financiële of gevoelige besluiten gepaste voorzichtigheid by en stuur nie na 'n verborge conclusie.

entries.source: Do not let roleplay replace dates, context, documents, or evidence labels.
entries.value: Moenie toelaat dat rolspel datums, konteks, dokumente of bewysetikette vdaarvang nie.

entries.source: Do not make a plan that assumes every topic needs equal time.
entries.value: Moenie 'n plan maak wat aanneem dat elke onderwerp ewe veel tyd nodig het nie.

entries.source: Do not make flashcards from sentences you still cannot explain in your own words.
entries.value: Moenie flitskaarte maak uit sinne wat jy nog nie in jou eie woorde kan verduidelik nie.

entries.source: Do not paste an assignment and ask for the finished response.
entries.value: Moenie 'n opdrag plak en vir die voltooide antwoord vra nie.

entries.source: Do not provide long copyrighted text. Work from user-provided excerpts or brief summaries.
entries.value: Gee geen lank kopieregelijk beschermde teks. Werk met fragmenten wat die gebruiker aanlevert of met kort opsommings.

entries.source: Do not provide therapy or crisis counseling. Encourage trusted human support for serious distress.
entries.value: Gee geen therapie of crisisbegeleiding. Moedig betrouwbare menslike steun aan by ernstige nood.

entries.source: Do not reproduce long copyrighted passages. Summarize user-provided text.
entries.value: Reproduceer geen lank kopieregelijk beschermde gedeeltes. Vat deur die gebruiker aangeleverde teks saam.

entries.source: Do not reread notes before testing what you can already recall.
entries.value: Moenie notas herlees voordat jy toets wat jy reeds kan herroep nie.

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: Herhaal nie alles evenveel

entries.source: Do not shame mistakes. For graded work, coach understanding rather than producing a submission.
entries.value: Beschaam foute nie. Coach by beoordeeld werk op begrip in plaas van 'n inzending te produceren.

entries.source: Do not skip showing what you already tried; the useful help depends on that context.
entries.value: Moenie nalaat om te wys wat jy reeds probeer het nie; nuttige hulp hang van daardie konteks af.

entries.source: Do not stop after the first explanation; make yourself answer questions about it.
entries.value: Moenie ná die eerste verduideliking stop nie; laat jouself vrae daaroor beantwoord.

entries.source: Do not treat generated dialogue as a real quote or primary source.
entries.value: Moenie gegenereere dialoog as 'n regte aanhaling of primêre bron behandel nie.

entries.source: Do something with it
entries.value: Doen iets daarmee

entries.source: Do the comparison pages include private user chats?
entries.value: Bevatten die vergelijkingsbladsye privaatchats van gebruikers?

entries.source: Do these guides connect to live AI learning tools?
entries.value: Verbinden hierdie gidse met lewendig AI-leerhulpmiddels?

entries.source: Do we have free will?
entries.value: Het ons vrye wil?

entries.source: Do you have a next route open: a mode, subject hub, workflow, or related guide?
entries.value: Het jy 'n volgende roete oopmaak: 'n modus, vakhub, werkvloei of verwante gids?

entries.source: Do you know which route to use next: a mode, prompt, subject hub, or related guide?
entries.value: Weet jy watter roete jy hierna moet gebruik: 'n modus, prompt, vakhub of verwante gids?

entries.source: Does inspir expose private homework chats to Google?
entries.value: Stelt inspir privaathuiswerkchats bloot aan Google?

entries.source: Does inspir publish a child's private chats?
entries.value: Publiceert inspir die privaatchats van 'n kind?

entries.source: Does inspir support schools?
entries.value: Ondersteun inspir skole?

entries.source: Does this comparison include private user chats?
entries.value: Bevat hierdie vergelyking privaatchats van gebruikers?

entries.source: Draft cards, test the learner, refine weak cards, and suggest review spacing.
entries.value: Maak conceptkaarte, test die leerder, verfyn swak kaarte en stel herhalingsspreiding vir.

entries.source: Draw a supply-demand graph
entries.value: Teken 'n vraag-en-aanbod-grafiek

entries.source: Draw/Sketch Board
entries.value: Teken-/Sketsbord

entries.source: due date
entries.value: sperdatum

entries.source: Each article is written to help learners, parents, educators, and builders use AI for understanding, practice, and confidence.
entries.value: Elke artikel is geskryf om leerders, ouers, onderwysers en bouwers te help AI te gebruik vir begrip, oefening en vertroue.

entries.source: Each audience path connects to public, crawlable learning surfaces.
entries.value: Elke teikengroeppad verbindt met openbare, crawlbare leeroppervlakken.

entries.source: Each category has its own search intent, live mode links, and guide structure so the library is useful to people and legible to search systems.
entries.value: Elke categorie wat is eie zoekintentie, lewendig modusskakels en gidsstruktuur, zodat die biblioteek nuttig is vir mense en leesbaar vir zoeksystemen.

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: Elke vergelyking is geskryf om eerlik, nuttig en aksiegefokus te is: waar die bekende hulpmiddel goed in is, waarin inspir anders is en watter openbare modus jy eers oopmaak.

entries.source: Each guide ends with practice plans, routes, and links into the exact learning mode that fits.
entries.value: Elke gids eindig met oefenplanne, roetes en skakels na die presiese leermodus wat pas.

entries.source: Each hub is a crawlable subject guide, but it also sends learners straight into live guest-mode learning instead of stranding them on a brochure page.
entries.value: Elke hub is 'n crawlbare vakgids, maar stuurt leerders ook regstreeks na lewendig leer in gasmodus in plaas van hulle op 'n brochurebladsy te laat stranden.

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public URL so learners can arrive from search directly inside the right learning experience.
entries.value: Elke leermodus wat 'n openbare URL, zodat leerders vanuit zoektake direk in die regte leerervaring kan binnenkomen.

entries.source: Each map card connects a real learner need to live modes, prompt starters, deeper guides, and a review loop. People can use it. Crawlers can understand it.
entries.value: Elke kaart verbindt 'n regte besluithoefte van 'n leerder met lewendig modusse, promptstarters, verdiepende gidse en 'n herhalingslus. Mense kan die gebruik. Crawlers kan wat begrijpen.

entries.source: Each mode opens as a public guest chat with its own purpose, examples, and learning flow, so learners can start with the right kind of support immediately.
entries.value: Elke modus open as 'n openbare gaansklets met sy eie doel, voorbeelde en leervloei, sodat leerders dadelik met die regte soort ondersteuning kan begin.

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Elke bladsy verbindt vergelijkingsintentie met lewendig modusse, gidse, prompts en AI-leesbare ontdekkingsleers.

entries.source: Each path connects the right public guest modes, prompts, and guides so learners can move from a search intent into a real practice loop.
entries.value: Elke pad verbindt die regte openbare gasmodusse, prompts en gidse, zodat leerders van 'n zoekintentie na 'n regte oefenlus kan bewegen.

entries.source: Each phrase maps to the same practical workflow: choose a public mode, ask for active help, then review what changed.
entries.value: Elke frase verwijst na dieselfde praktiese werkvloei: kies 'n openbare modus, vraag om aktiewe hulp en bekyk daarna wat veranderde.

entries.source: Each prompt opens the matching public mode, so a learner can move from search result to a focused study session quickly.
entries.value: Elke prompt oopmaak die bijgepaste openbare modus, zodat 'n leerder vinnig van zoekresultaat na 'n gefokusde studiesessie kan gaan.

entries.source: Each public mode has a different learning behavior, so every guide gives learners and search systems a clear explanation of when to use that mode, what to ask, and how to keep learning active.
entries.value: Elke openbare modus wat ander leergedrag, daarom geeft elke gids leerders en zoeksystemen 'n duidelike verduideliking van wanneer jy die modus gebruik, wat jy vra en hoe jy wat leer aktief houdt.

entries.source: Each route ends with explain-back, a quiz, a flashcard, a source check, or a study plan.
entries.value: Elke roete eindigt met terugverduideliking, 'n vasvra, 'n flitskaart, 'n bronkontrole of 'n studieplan.

entries.source: Each step opens a live guest mode, so this is not a static guide. It is a route into practice, feedback, and review.
entries.value: Elke stap oopmaak 'n lewendig gasmodus, dus hierdie is geen statische gids. Die is 'n roete na oefening, terugvoer en herhaling.

entries.source: Each subject hub names the learning job, recommends the right focused modes, and shows how to finish with evidence of understanding instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: Elke vakhub benoemt die leertaak, beveelt die regte gefokusde modusse aan en laat sien hoe jy eindigt met bewyse van begrip in plaas van passief antwoorde kopieer.

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: Makkelijk. Schuif wat later deur.

entries.source: Economics Simulator
entries.value: Ekonomiesimulator

entries.source: economics simulator AI
entries.value: ekonomiesimulator-AI

entries.source: Economics Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Play with markets, scarcity, incentives, policy, and personal finance through simple simulations.
entries.value: Economics Simulator AI Learning Mode is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik vir leer in plaas van passiewe antwoordversameling. Die modus draai om 'n spesifieke taak: speel met marken, schaarste, prikkels, beleid en persoonlike financiën via eenvoudige simulaties.

entries.source: Economics Simulator AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Economics Simulator AI Learning Mode: praktiese gids

entries.value: opvoedkundige tegnologie

entries.value: Onderwysprogram

entries.source: EducationalAudience
entries.value: EducationalAudience

entries.source: EducationalOrganization
entries.value: Onderwysorgaannisasie

entries.source: Effects of the printing press
entries.value: Gevolge van die drukpers

entries.source: End by writing the strongest claim and strongest counterclaim.
entries.value: Eindig deur die sterkste claim en sterkste teenclaim op te skryf.

entries.source: End with a recap from memory.
entries.value: Eindig met 'n opsomming uit jy hoofd.

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: Eindig met 'n opsomming wat jy self skryf.

entries.source: End with a request for a question, misconception check, quiz, or next-step hint.
entries.value: Eindig met 'n versoek om 'n vraag, wanopvattingkontrole, vasvra of wenk vir die volgende stap.

entries.source: End with evidence of learning.
entries.value: Eindig met bewyse van leer.

entries.source: English

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas
entries.value: Etiese dilemmas

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Work through dilemmas by weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, rights, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: Ethics Dilemmas AI Learning Mode is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik vir leer in plaas van passiewe antwoordversameling. Die modus draai om 'n spesifieke taak: werk deur dilemma's heen deur belanghebbenden, gevolg, plichten, regte en afwegingen te wegen.

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Ethics Dilemmas AI Learning Mode: praktiese gids

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas prompts and study loop
entries.value: Ethics Dilemmas-prompts en studielus

entries.source: Evaluate a mode before using it with learners
entries.value: Evalueer 'n modus voordat jy wat met leerders gebruik

entries.source: Evaluate a public AI learning layer first, then explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, content alignment, and usage funding.
entries.value: Evalueer eers 'n openbare AI-leerlaag en verken daarna aangepaste werkvloeie, vertroulikheidsbehoeften, inhoudelijke afstemming en gebruiksfinanciering.

entries.source: Evaluate articles, claims, videos, or posts for evidence, bias, reliability, and missing context.
entries.value: Evalueer artikels, bewerings, video's of plasings vir bewyse, vooroordeel, betroubaarheid en ontbrekende konteks.

entries.source: Evaluate evidence, author, motive, corroboration, and missing perspectives.
entries.value: Evalueer bewyse, outeur, motief, corroboratie en ontbrekende perspectieven.

entries.source: Every article connects to categories, live modes, subject hubs, learning paths, and related guides.
entries.value: Elke artikel skakel met kategorieë, lewendige modusse, vakhubs, leerpaaie en verwante gidse.

entries.source: Every article in this topic cluster.
entries.value: Elke artikel in hierdie onderwerpcluster.

entries.source: Every core learning mode has a public guest entrypoint so people can start from search, social, or a shared link.
entries.value: Elke kernleermodus wat 'n openbaar gastoegangspunt, zodat mense kan starten vanuit zoeken, sosiale media of 'n gedeelde link.

entries.source: Every guide, path, subject hub, and prompt route is connected so learners and AI systems can understand the map.
entries.value: Elke gids, pad, vakhub en promptroete is verbind sodat leerders en AI-stelsels die kaart kan verstaan.

entries.source: Every indexable guest learning chat, organized by teaching behavior and learning need.
entries.value: Elke indexeerbare gaanstleerchat, georgaanniseerd op onderwijsgedrag en leerbehoefte.

entries.source: Every link here is public and crawlable. Private user chats stay out of comparison, sitemap, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Elke link hier is openbaar en crawlbaar. Privéchats van gebruikers bly buite vergelijkingen, sitemap en AI-leesbare ontdekkingsleers.

entries.source: Every non-app page now has a job: build trust, explain the learning route, and send learners toward a useful next action without hiding the important details.
entries.value: Elke nie-appbladsy het nou 'n taak: bou vertroue, verduidelik die leerroete en stuur leerders na 'n nuttige volgende aksie sonder om die belangrike besonderhede weg te steek.

entries.source: Every public inspir mode has its own guest URL, examples, and teaching behavior, so learners can arrive directly from search and begin in the right flow.
entries.value: Elke openbare inspir-modus wat is eie gaanst-URL, voorbeelde en onderwijsgedrag, zodat leerders direk vanuit zoektake kan binnenkomen en in die regte flow kan begin.

entries.source: Every public learning mode has guides and prompt loops.
entries.value: Elke openbare leermodus wat gidse en promptlusse.

entries.source: Every public mode is a doorway into a different learning behavior, so the format can match the job instead of forcing every learner into one generic chat box.
entries.value: Elke openbare modus is 'n deur na ander leergedrag, zodat die vorm kan passen by die taak in plaas van elke leerder in een generiek chatvak te dwingen.

entries.source: Every subject page connects content to action.
entries.value: Elke vakbladsy verbindt inhoud met aksie.

entries.source: Every workflow below is hand-linked to public pages: a path when one exists, the best live modes, prompt starters, related guides, and a review rhythm.
entries.value: Elke werkvloei hieronder is handmatig gekoppel aan openbare bladsye: 'n pad wanneer dat bestaan, die beste lewendig modusse, promptstarters, verwante gidse en 'n herhalingsritme.

entries.source: EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY LAW, YOU WILL HOLD US AND OUR OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS HARMLESS FOR ANY INDIRECT, PUNITIVE, SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGE, HOWEVER IT ARISES (INCLUDING ATTORNEYS’ FEES AND ALL RELATED COSTS AND EXPENSES OF LITIGATION AND ARBITRATION, OR AT TRIAL OR ON APPEAL, IF ANY, WHETHER OR NOT LITIGATION OR ARBITRATION IS INSTITUTED), WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, NEGLIGENCE, OR OTHER TORTIOUS ACTION, OR ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THIS AGREEMENT, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION ANY CLAIM FOR PERSONAL INJURY OR PROPERTY DAMAGE, ARISING FROM THIS AGREEMENT AND ANY VIOLATION BY YOU OF ANY FEDERAL, STATE, OR LOCAL LAWS, STATUTES, RULES, OR REGULATIONS, EVEN IF COMPANY HAS BEEN PREVIOUSLY ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGE. EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY LAW, IF THERE IS LIABILITY FOUND ON THE PART OF COMPANY, IT WILL BE LIMITED TO THE AMOUNT PAID FOR THE PRODUCTS AND/OR SERVICES, AND UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES WILL THERE BE CONSEQUENTIAL OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. SOME STATES DO NOT ALLOW THE EXCLUSION OR LIMITATION OF PUNITIVE, INCIDENTAL OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, SO THE PRIOR LIMITATION OR EXCLUSION MAY NOT APPLY TO YOU.
entries.value: Behalwe waar die wet dit verbied, vrywaar jy ons en ons beamptes, direkteure, werknemers en agente teen enige indirekte, strafregtelike, spesiale, toevallige of gevolglike skade, hoe dit ook al ontstaan, insluitend prokureursfooie en alle verwante koste en uitgawes van litigasie en arbitrasie, by verhoor of op appel, indien enige, ongeag of litigasie of arbitrasie ingestel is. Dit geld vir eise uit kontrak, nalatigheid of ander onregmatige optrede, of wat uit hierdie ooreenkoms voortspruit of daarmee verband hou, insluitend, sonder beperking, enige eis vir persoonlike besering of eiendomskade wat uit hierdie ooreenkoms en enige oortreding deur jou van federale, staats- of plaaslike wette, statute, reels of regulasies voortspruit, selfs al is Company vooraf van die moontlikheid van sodanige skade in kennis gestel. Behalwe waar die wet dit verbied, indien aanspreeklikheid aan die kant van Company bevind word, sal dit beperk wees tot die bedrag wat vir die produkte en/of dienste betaal is, en onder geen omstandighede sal daar gevolglike of strafskade wees nie. Sommige state laat nie die uitsluiting of beperking van strafskade, toevallige skade of gevolglike skade toe nie, dus mag die voorafgaande beperking of uitsluiting nie op jou van toepassing wees nie.

entries.source: Explain My Answer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Explain My Answer AI Learning Mode is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik vir leer in plaas van passiewe antwoordversameling. Die modus draai om 'n spesifieke taak: plak 'n vraag, jou antwoord en die verwagte antwoord as jy dat wat. Jy buddy legt die redenasie uit en help jou dieselfde fout die volgende keer te vermy.
